flat_unirig_westlake.role: Westlake-only development comparison; do not replace with another server's checkpoint

verified_fixed_causes: the final rootless-v3 target contains no synthetic root and no generated tail token
the query mesh and target skeleton use the same random query pose and query-bbox coordinate system
global RT is removed from the current training input and is not the active data hypothesis
the current loader returns 1024 ordered query-aligned surface anchors
verified_open_facts: the flat UniRig baseline can generate useful skeletons but still has hitmax and topology-template failures
motion affects prediction and is not completely ignored, but its contribution is not a stable articulation mechanism
the current motion condition mixes static appearance, action magnitude, local relative motion, and learned feature drift
the final skeleton loss does not explicitly require the motion encoder to recover same-segment relations or skin boundaries
low observed motion is unknown evidence rather than a negative structural label
early condition-to-joint errors can be amplified when the autoregressive self-prefix later dominates the condition
unknowns: whether local relative-distance trajectories predict same-segment and skin-boundary relations on held-out assets
how to represent confidence so low motion remains unknown rather than becoming a false negative
whether a separate motion-evidence memory improves child and branch generation without degrading root grounding or normal controls
next_required_result: Using only the Westlake rootless-v3 train/valid manifests, validate local relative-motion evidence against soft skin same-segment/boundary labels on asset-disjoint held-out rows. Compare correct anchor correspondence with repeated-query zero motion and anchor-correspondence corruption, report motion-stratified metrics, runtime, and visualizations. Do not load a skeleton checkpoint for this first stage and do not train or submit the formal model.

active_operation.name: local_relative_motion_evidence_preflight_20260724
active_operation.formal_resources: two A100-80GB in an allowed Westlake resource group
active_operation.acceptance_test: held-out evidence quality under correct, zero-motion, and corrupted-correspondence controls; low-motion uncertainty behavior; extraction runtime and memory; representative evidence/skin-boundary visualizations

last_operation.name: wrong_context_cleanup_20260724
last_operation.conclusion: the canonical context now contains only the Westlake local-motion-evidence task; all mistakenly imported cross-server copies and temporary local artifacts were removed
